meta.name: Windows Shortcut Maker User DB
meta.desc: Master database for hidden and highly useful native Windows shortcuts.
meta.change_note: Added blacklist arrays, subfolder routing config, and populated meta dates.
meta.note: Versioning/edit tracking only applies to structural updates and not changing of values by user

shortcuts.name: 01_Reboot_to_BIOS
shortcuts.desc: Forces a reboot directly into UEFI/BIOS firmware settings.

shortcuts.name: 02_Force_Shutdown
shortcuts.desc: Immediately closes all applications and shuts down the PC.

shortcuts.name: 03_Flush_DNS
shortcuts.desc: Clears the DNS cache to fix host resolution issues.

shortcuts.name: 04_System_SFC_Repair
shortcuts.desc: Scans and repairs corrupted Windows system files.

shortcuts.name: 05_DISM_Image_Fix
shortcuts.desc: Repairs the Windows System Image using online sources.

shortcuts.name: 06_Restart_Explorer
shortcuts.desc: Restarts the Windows Shell (Taskbar, Desktop).

shortcuts.name: 07_God_Mode_Folder
shortcuts.desc: Creates a folder with access to all Windows settings.

shortcuts.name: 08_Resource_Monitor
shortcuts.desc: Detailed real-time hardware and process monitoring.

shortcuts.name: 09_Network_Connections
shortcuts.desc: Opens the classic Network Adapters control window.

shortcuts.name: 10_Registry_Editor
shortcuts.desc: Advanced Windows configuration database editor.

shortcuts.name: 11_Slide_to_Shutdown
shortcuts.desc: Enables the tablet-style slide-down shutdown interface.

shortcuts.name: 12_Battery_Report
shortcuts.desc: Generates a detailed battery health report.

shortcuts.name: 13_Remote_Desktop
shortcuts.desc: Opens the Remote Desktop Connection client.

shortcuts.name: 14_Disk_Cleanup
shortcuts.desc: Utility to remove temporary files and free up disk space.

shortcuts.name: 15_Abort_Shutdown
shortcuts.desc: Cancels any pending system shutdown or restart.

shortcuts.name: 16_Advanced_Boot
shortcuts.desc: Restarts into the Windows Advanced Boot/Recovery menu.

shortcuts.name: 17_Group_Policy_Update
shortcuts.desc: Forces an immediate refresh of all Group Policy settings.

shortcuts.name: 18_User_Accounts
shortcuts.desc: Advanced User Accounts control panel (Auto-login, etc).

shortcuts.name: 19_Local_Security_Policy
shortcuts.desc: Opens the Local Security Policy editor.

shortcuts.name: 20_DirectX_Diag
shortcuts.desc: Shows detailed DirectX and hardware component info.

shortcuts.name: 21_Disk_Management
shortcuts.desc: Tool for managing partitions and drives.

shortcuts.name: 22_Event_Viewer
shortcuts.desc: View system logs and error reports.

shortcuts.name: 23_System_Information
shortcuts.desc: Comprehensive summary of hardware and software.

shortcuts.name: 24_Certificates_Mgr
shortcuts.desc: Manage user and system security certificates.

shortcuts.name: 25_Device_Manager
shortcuts.desc: Manage hardware drivers and connected devices.

shortcuts.name: 26_Reliability_Monitor
shortcuts.desc: Shows a timeline of system crashes, app failures, and warnings.

shortcuts.name: 27_Classic_Volume_Mixer
shortcuts.desc: Opens the legacy volume mixer for per-app audio control.

shortcuts.name: 28_Startup_Folder
shortcuts.desc: Opens the current user's auto-startup programs folder.

shortcuts.name: 29_Clear_Clipboard
shortcuts.desc: Instantly wipes all copied text/files from the system clipboard.

shortcuts.name: 30_Edit_Hosts_File
shortcuts.desc: Opens the Windows hosts file in Notepad for DNS overriding.

shortcuts.name: 31_Lock_Workstation
shortcuts.desc: Instantly locks the PC and returns to the Windows sign-in screen.

shortcuts.name: 32_Memory_Diagnostic
shortcuts.desc: Checks the system RAM for hardware errors and faults.

shortcuts.name: 33_Ping_Custom_DNS
shortcuts.desc: Pings a selected DNS server to check latency.

shortcuts.name: 34_Get_Adapter_Info
shortcuts.desc: Shows IP configuration for a specific network adapter dynamically retrieved.
shortcuts.command: cmd /k netsh interface ipv4 show addresses "[ENUM_VAL]"

shortcuts.name: 35_Quick_Timer
shortcuts.desc: Starts a countdown timer for a selected duration at runtime.
